related_actions.explanation: Open-ended prompt for more user input may enable later specification, but does not itself set the named-lead-tech focus requirement.

related_actions.explanation: Initiates the research/plan workflow in which the requirement (specific focus on named lead tech) can be carried into the plan.

related_actions.explanation: User’s request to start research advances execution of the plan that must meet the named-lead-tech focus requirement.

related_actions.explanation: Summarizes next steps for launching; supports completion but does not directly enforce the named-lead-tech focus requirement.

related_actions.explanation: Recommends initiating development around topics; contributes guidance but not specifically about the named-lead-tech focus constraint.

related_actions.explanation: User explicitly requests an audio overview, which directly sets up the requirement that the assistant provide an audio overview title and metadata (including duration).

related_actions.explanation: Specifies the podcast subject; provides necessary context for what the audio overview should be about, though it doesn’t itself demand metadata/duration.
